steps.title: Represent the total animals
steps.content: The variables count two types of animals. The number of rabbits is $r$, and the number of hamsters is $h$, so the total number of animals is $r+h$.

steps.title: Translate the limit
steps.content:
The phrase "at most $58$" means the total can be $58$ or any smaller number. That gives
$$r+h\le 58$$
The answer is D.
